'''zhasava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yagi|yagi]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-s-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yagi|yagi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhasava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæsævæth|zhæsævæth]] || [[word:zhæsævæj|zhæsævæj]] || [[word:zhæsævæsh|zhæsævæsh]] || [[word:zhæsævæ|zhæsævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhasasavath|zhasasavath]] || [[word:zhasasavaj|zhasasavaj]] || [[word:zhasasavash|zhasasavash]] || [[word:zhasasava|zhasasava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhasavath|zhasavath]] || [[word:zhasavaj|zhasavaj]] || [[word:zhasavash|zhasavash]] || [[word:zhasava|zhasava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhasafvath|zhasafvath]] || [[word:zhasafvaj|zhasafvaj]] || [[word:zhasafvash|zhasafvash]] || [[word:zhasafvaf|zhasafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhasavatha|zhasavatha]] || [[word:zhasavaja|zhasavaja]] || [[word:zhasavasha|zhasavasha]] || [[word:zhasavaka|zhasavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhasavath|zhasavath]] || [[word:zhasavaj|zhasavaj]] || [[word:zhasavash|zhasavash]] || [[word:zhasava|zhasava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhasavathal|zhasavathal]] || [[word:zhasavajal|zhasavajal]] || [[word:zhasavashal|zhasavashal]] || [[word:zhasavakal|zhasavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhasavathatha|zhasavathatha]] || [[word:zhasavajaja|zhasavajaja]] || [[word:zhasavashasha|zhasavashasha]] || [[word:zhasavaka|zhasavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhasavathan|zhasavathan]] || [[word:zhasavajan|zhasavajan]] || [[word:zhasavashan|zhasavashan]] || [[word:zhasavakan|zhasavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhasavathaoro|zhasavathaoro]] || [[word:zhasavajaoro|zhasavajaoro]] || [[word:zhasavashaoro|zhasavashaoro]] || [[word:zhasavakaoro|zhasavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
